chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْقَوْمِ يَجْتَمِعُونَ عَلَى الصَّيْدِ وَ هُمْ مُحْرِمُونَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – The group gathering upon the hunting, and they are in Ihraam

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/385)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/385)
text: مُحْرِمَيْنِ أَصَابَا صَيْداً فَقَالَ عَلَى كُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمَا الْفِدَاءُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Shihad, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws, regarding the ones in Ihraam hunting a prey. So heasws said: ‘Upon each one of them is the ransom’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from Shihab from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked one of the two Imam, (abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah), ‘Alayhim al-Salam, about the case of two people who in the state of Ihram hunt and kill an animal. He (the Imam) said, ‘Each one of them owes a ransom.’
